pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-004 (Core Abilities/Skill) scores 0.454 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.454). Scope is edge_case for Algorithmic Trading Engineer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Core Abilities, composite 0.454. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Core Abilities for Algorithmic Trading Engineer at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Core Abilities appears in ~40% of Algorithmic Trading Engineer postings as a secondary competency. Quantitative analytical abilities appear implicitly in ATE job requirements. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Core Abilities without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Core Abilities without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
